_note: Hetzner/Coolify not yet provisioned. Fill in COOLIFY_* values once the server is set up.

staging.migrationsCommand: docker compose -f docker-compose.staging.yml exec -T backend node backend/dist/db/migrate.js
staging.sanitisationCheckQuery: psql $STAGING_DATABASE_URL -t -c "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM seeds WHERE created_at < now() - interval '1 day'" 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' '

production.migrationsCommand: docker compose exec -T backend node backend/dist/db/migrate.js
